_comment: Maps crt.sh CA owner names to CCADB CA owner names where they diverge. Keys are crt.sh names, values are CCADB names. When a crt.sh name maps to a CCADB name that is another CA's parent (e.g. QuoVadis -> DigiCert via acquisition), set 'parent' to the CCADB owner and 'note' to explain.

WISeKey.note: WISeKey operates under OISTE Foundation roots

QuoVadis Trustlink B.V..note: QuoVadis acquired by DigiCert in 2019, roots now under DigiCert in CCADB

Quo Vadis Trustlink B.V..note: Alternate spelling, same as QuoVadis Trustlink B.V.

Verizon Terremark NV.note: Verizon/GTE CyberTrust roots transferred to DigiCert

Verizon.note: Legacy Verizon roots transferred to DigiCert

T-Systems International GmbH.note: T-Systems is subsidiary of Deutsche Telekom

Siemens AG.note: Siemens PKI operations moved to Atos/Eviden

Siemens.note: Siemens PKI operations moved to Atos/Eviden
